subcodes.first_line: He Who is the Intended One testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath spoken with truth is verily the Supreme Horizon and the Ultimate Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المقصود انه لا اله الا هو و الذی نطق بالحق لهو الافق الاعلی و السدره المنتهی
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
